items.body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

This is a well-defined engineering task to bump the **typespec-client-generator-core (TCGC)** dependency to version **0.66.1** in the Azure Generator (`eng/packages/http-client-csharp`) and regenerate affected libraries.

The issue is already labeled correctly (`Client`, `CodeGen`) and assigned to the appropriate team members.

<details>
<summary>📋 Task Breakdown</summary>

- [ ] Bump `@typespec/http-client-csharp` to `1.0.0-alpha.20260311.2` in `eng/packages/http-client-csharp/package.json`
- [ ] Bump `@azure-tools/typespec-client-generator-core` to `0.66.1` and update related transitive dependencies (following the pattern from [this commit](https://github.com/microsoft/typespec/commit/458f881c835e97b7853a7804425cce6674e16acc))
- [ ] Update [`eng/http-client-csharp-emitter-package.json`](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/http-client-csharp-emitter-package.json) and its lock file with the new emitter version and dependency versions
- [ ] Run `npm install` in `eng/packages/http-client-csharp`
- [ ] Rerun `./eng/scripts/Generate.ps1` to regenerate test projects
- [ ] Regenerate all unbranded libraries with `tsp-location.yaml` containing `emitterPackageJsonPath: eng/http-client-csharp-emitter-package.json` by running `dotnet build /t:GenerateCode` in each library path
- [ ] Run pre-commit checks: `dotnet format`, export public API listings, update snippets as needed

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔧 Relevant Files & Paths</summary>

- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp/package.json` — main emitter package manifest
- `eng/http-client-csharp-emitter-package.json` — emitter package used by unbranded SDK libraries
- `eng/packages/http-client-csharp/eng/scripts/Generate.ps1` — script to regenerate test projects
- Libraries using `emitterPackageJsonPath: eng/http-client-csharp-emitter-package.json` in their `tsp-location.yaml`

</details>

<details>
<summary>⚠️ Potential Issues to Watch For</summary>

- **Breaking changes in TCGC 0.66.1**: Review the TCGC changelog for any breaking changes or new features that may affect generated code output. Generated code diffs should be reviewed carefully.
- **Lock file consistency**: Ensure the `package-lock.json` / lock file is regenerated consistently with `npm install --package-lock-only` or a clean `npm install`.
- **Test failures**: After running `Generate.ps1`, verify that Spector tests and unit tests in `eng/packages/http-client-csharp` still pass.
- **Path length issues on Windows**: Previous bumps have encountered long path issues with Spector test output (see closed [#55026](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/55026)) — check generated paths don't exceed 260 chars.
- **Library regeneration scope**: Use `tsp-location.yaml` search to identify all affected unbranded libraries: `grep -r "emitterPackageJsonPath: eng/http-client-csharp-emitter-package.json" sdk/ --include="tsp-location.yaml" -l`

</details>

<details>
<summary>📚 Helpful Resources</summary>

- [TCGC 0.66.1 package](https://github.com/Azure/typespec-azure/tree/main/packages/typespec-client-generator-core)
- [Reference dependency bump commit](https://github.com/microsoft/typespec/commit/458f881c835e97b7853a7804425cce6674e16acc)
- [Azure Generator README](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp)
- [AGENTS.md — generator workflow](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/AGENTS.md)

</details>
